title: The Big Picture: US grain effect
section_path: The Big Picture: US grain effect
section_path_text: The Big Picture: US grain effect
summary:
Main
﻿

The Big Picture: US grain effect
US grain trades have been less prominent this year, mainly to the detriment of Panamaxes, but also negative for geared sectors. With a view to the Q4, it looks likely that the main US soybean export season will benefit Panamax demand in particular. With the Supramax 10 TC average having briefly crept above $10,000/day this week and increased grain-related Panamax enquiry emerging in the Atlantic, the main US soybean export season has attracted our attention.
